race.description: Kevlacat Power Boats Australia Mdn Plate
race.comment: KING OF VALHALLA (4) was doing his best work late last start to get up for third over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly. This is a winnable contest and can run right over the top of them late. LUMINOUS GIRL (9) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast, beaten 5 lengths. Strips fitter now and is a likely improver with strong prospects. EXOBRAZEN (2) stepped out for the first time last start and was just fair in finishing fifth at Sunshine Coast over 1000m, beaten 3.5 lengths. Better with race experience now under the belt and is one of the main contenders. BLUE SKIES AHEAD (11) is a filly by King's Legacy out of Dreamer's Disease who is at the races for the first time today. Respect any market confidence.
